_comment: Manual market override file for the Polymarket Reward Bot.
_comment_2: This file is OPTIONAL. The dashboard normally provides the market reference dynamically.
_comment_3: If the dashboard has no manual market configured, the bot will fall back to this file.
_comment_4: Only ONE reference field is required. Prefer using the 'url' field because it is the most stable and user-friendly.
_comment_supported_fields: Supported reference types (use only one): url | slug | condition_id | market_id
_future_options: Below are alternative reference formats that can be used instead of URL.
_future_note: These fields are ignored unless the code is modified to use them directly.
_comment_optional_metadata: Optional informational fields. These are NOT required by the bot and are ignored by the resolver.
_comment_optional_metadata_2: They can be useful for documentation or debugging.
notes: Optional description of why this market is manually selected.
_example_advanced: Older versions of the bot used a fully specified market structure. That is no longer required because the PolyClient can resolve the market dynamically from the reference above.
